DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-30-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BARTON WILLIAMS, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S SECOND AND THIRD CAUSES OF ACTION.

Defendants City and County of San Francisco and Barton Williams' demurrer to the second and third cause of action in plaintiff Markel Services Incorporated's complaint is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. No opposition filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
